title: geum hispidum subsp. paui
intro: Geum hispidum subsp. paui, also known as Spanish Avens, is a plant species within the Rosaceae family, characterized by its pink or white flowers and feathery foliage. The medicinal properties of Geum hispidum subsp. paui lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. In traditional herbal preparations, Geum hispidum subsp. paui is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
